question: Will Real Betis win La Liga?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Real Betis is the 2024-25 La Liga Champion. Otherwise, the market will resolve to “No”.

If it is a mathematical certainty Real Betis will win, this market will immediately resolve to “Yes.” Likewise, if it becomes mathematically impossible for Real Betis to win, this market will immediately resolve to “No.” Potential retroactive points deductions past these points will have no bearing on this market’s resolution.
